prompts.title: Young Man on Japanese Bicycle
prompts.prompt: A portrait of a young man with a fair complexion, dark brown eyes, and short dark hair styled neatly with a light beard and mustache. He is seated on a sleek modern Japanese bicycle while holding a contemporary iPhone. He is wearing a stylish gray and black Peshawari Kameez (Shalwar) with intricate detailing around the collar and cuffs. The background shows a vibrant Japanese urban street with soft daylight and subtle bokeh suggesting a bustling city environment. Realistic style with cinematic quality, sharp focus on the subject and slightly blurred background.

prompts.title: Cinematic Portrait with Yamaha MT-15
prompts.prompt: Ultra-realistic 4K cinematic portrait of a handsome young man seated naturally in a wide lush green grass field during soft golden daylight. He is wearing a stylish gray outfit — a fitted gray hoodie with matching gray pants and clean white sneakers. His face, hairstyle, beard texture, and facial proportions match the reference image exactly (100%), maintaining natural skin tone and realistic facial details. He is sitting casually on the grass with a relaxed posture, giving a confident Instagram-style portrait pose, looking directly into the camera with a calm and composed expression. In the background, slightly blurred with strong shallow depth of field, a sleek black Yamaha MT-15 motorcycle is parked on the grass, adding a modern lifestyle vibe to the scene. Soft wind moves the grass gently around him, creating a cinematic natural atmosphere. The lighting is soft natural sunlight with subtle shadows, producing highly detailed skin texture, sharp eyes, realistic fabric folds, and professional portrait depth. Shot on a 85mm lens, f/1.8 aperture, ultra-photorealistic, HDR, 4K, high dynamic range, cinematic color grading.

prompts.title: Cinematic Portrait with Royal Enfield Hunter 350
prompts.prompt: Ultra-realistic 4K cinematic portrait of a handsome young man sitting naturally in a wide lush green grass field during warm golden hour sunlight. He is wearing a stylish gray outfit — a fitted gray hoodie, matching gray jogger pants, and clean white sneakers. His face, hairstyle, beard texture, and facial proportions match the reference image exactly, maintaining natural skin tone, sharp eyes, and realistic facial details. He is seated casually on the grass with a relaxed posture, arms resting comfortably on his knees, giving a confident Instagram-style portrait pose while looking directly at the camera with a calm and composed expression. In the background, slightly blurred with strong shallow depth of field, a sleek black Royal Enfield Hunter 350 motorcycle is parked on the grass, adding a modern lifestyle and adventure vibe to the scene. Tall green grass gently moves with the wind, creating a natural cinematic environment. Soft natural sunlight creates subtle shadows and highlights across the face and clothing, producing highly detailed skin texture, realistic fabric folds, and professional portrait depth. Shot with an 85mm portrait lens, f/1.8 aperture, ultra-photorealistic, HDR, 4K resolution, high dynamic range, cinematic color grading, shallow depth of field, professional photography.

prompts.title: Fan Moment with Shahrukh Khan
prompts.prompt: Create an ultra-realistic 4K photograph of a fan meeting a legendary Bollywood-style superstar, Shahrukh Khan, at a premium, red-carpet-style event. The superstar is wearing a classy black outfit, exuding confidence, charm, and a warm smile for the camera. The fan (use the reference image provided — keep my face 100% identical, including skin texture, facial hair, hairstyle, expression, and all facial features with no alterations) stands beside the superstar, slightly leaning in for a friendly picture. Maintain realistic body proportions, natural lighting, reflections, and shadows, capturing the excitement of the moment. Background: premium event environment with subtle blur to focus on the two subjects, soft cinematic lighting, natural depth of field. Ensure the fan and superstar appear naturally together in a photorealistic, high-quality, Instagram-ready photograph. Shot with a high-end portrait lens, f/1.8 aperture, HDR, 4K resolution, cinematic color grading, photorealistic details in clothing, skin, and hair.

prompts.title: Cinematic Side-Profile Beard Portrait
prompts.prompt: A hyper-realistic, low-key cinematic side-profile portrait of a handsome man with a thick, well-groomed beard, captured in a confident and relaxed standing posture. He has a calm, composed expression, wearing a dark, well-fitted shirt (fully clothed, not shirtless, no bare chest visible). The lighting is dramatic and minimal, with soft directional light illuminating only part of the face while the rest fades into shadow, creating a moody and professional atmosphere. Subtle rim lighting highlights the contours of the face, beard texture, and fabric details. The skin shows natural texture with fine details. The background is deep charcoal or black with a smooth gradient, creating strong contrast and shallow depth of field. Shot on 85mm lens, high resolution, professional photography aesthetic, vertical 9:16 aspect ratio, centered composition suitable for a Facebook profile picture.

prompts.title: Polished Male Portrait with Bokeh
prompts.prompt: A high-end, professional headshot of a handsome man with perfectly styled, voluminous brown hair and light stubble, standing in a relaxed yet confident pose. He is wearing a light blue button-down shirt, standing centered in the frame. The lighting is soft and flattering, with a clear catchlight in his eyes. The background features a beautiful, warm golden bokeh effect with soft circular light orbs. Hyper-realistic skin texture, sharp focus on the face, 8k resolution, masterpiece quality, vertical 9:16 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Professional Office Look
prompts.prompt: A professional and sophisticated portrait of a handsome man with styled, wavy light brown hair, standing in a poised and elegant manner. He is wearing a tailored grey linen suit jacket over a crisp white shirt, standing in a modern, high-end office environment. His posture is upright and professional, with soft, natural daylight coming from a window. The background is slightly out of focus, showing architectural details. High-resolution photography, realistic skin tones, sharp details, 8k, vertical 9:16 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Thoughtful Cafe Portrait
prompts.prompt: A cinematic portrait of a young man sitting outdoors at a cafe, resting his chin on his hand in a thoughtful pose, looking slightly away from the camera. Soft natural golden hour lighting with warm tones illuminating his face. Shallow depth of field with a creamy blurred background (bokeh), urban environment subtly visible. Modern hairstyle, well-groomed beard, wearing a light casual shirt with sleeves slightly rolled up. High detail, sharp focus on the face, smooth skin tones, professional color grading, 85mm lens, f/1.8, DSLR quality, natural shadows, realistic and clean aesthetic, vertical 9:16 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Elite Supercar Cockpit
prompts.prompt: Hyper-realistic 8K vertical portrait of a handsome man in the driver's seat of a high-end supercar. The shot captures a close-up angle showing his confident expression. His skin texture is incredibly detailed, showing fine pores, subtle facial hair stubble, and natural skin oils under warm cabin ambient lighting. He wears a premium pebbled-leather jacket; you can see the individual grains and stitching. The background shows the blurred carbon-fiber dashboard and a hint of the city through the window. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 35mm f/1.4 G-Master lens, ISO 100, shutter speed 1/250. Vertical 9:16 aspect ratio, raw photo style, no filter.

prompts.title: Dark Academia Library
prompts.prompt: Professional 8K widescreen photograph of a sophisticated man in an ancient, mahogany-filled library. He is leaning against a shelf, holding an open antique book with yellowed, textured pages. The lighting is provided by a green-shaded banker's lamp, creating realistic volumetric dust motes in the air and soft shadows on his face. His navy turtleneck shows realistic knit fibers and micro-lint. The focus is razor-sharp on his eyes, with a creamy bokeh blurring the rows of books behind him. Shot on Canon EOS R5, 85mm f/1.2L, f/2.0, natural warm tones. Cinematic 16:9 aspect ratio, photorealistic.

prompts.title: Industrial Athlete
prompts.prompt: Raw, unedited vertical portrait of a fit man in a gritty industrial gym. The lighting is harsh overhead fluorescent, creating dramatic shadows that define his muscle structure. His charcoal compression shirt shows realistic fabric tension and moisture-wicking texture. Micro-beads of sweat are visible on his forehead and neck, reflecting the light. The background features blurred iron weight plates and rusted metal beams. Shot on Nikon Z9, 50mm f/1.8, high contrast, sharp focus on skin texture and eyes. Vertical 9:16 aspect ratio, documentary photography style.

prompts.title: Nordic Winter Expedition
prompts.prompt: High-fidelity 8K widescreen shot of a man in a snowy Scandinavian forest. He wears a heavy, textured camel-hair overcoat and a chunky wool scarf; individual fibers and snowflakes caught in the wool are visible. His cheeks and nose have a natural cold-weather flush. The lighting is the soft, flat light of a cloudy winter day, casting no harsh shadows. The background is a dense, out-of-focus pine forest covered in heavy snow. Shot on Fujifilm GFX 100S, 110mm f/2, f/2.8, ultra-detailed skin and fabric. Cinematic 16:9 aspect ratio, real life photography.

prompts.title: Amalfi Coast Sunset
prompts.prompt: Vertical lifestyle photograph of a man standing on a balcony overlooking the Amalfi Coast at sunset. He is wearing a breathable white linen shirt; the fabric shows realistic wrinkles and semi-transparency. The golden hour sun hits his face at a 45-degree angle, creating a perfect Rembrandt lighting effect with natural catchlights in his eyes. His hair is slightly tousled by the sea breeze. The background shows the blurred colorful villas and the sparkling Mediterranean Sea. Shot on Leica M11, 35mm f/2 Summicron, vibrant but natural colors. Vertical 9:16 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Cyber-Tech Workspace
prompts.prompt: Widescreen 8K portrait of a tech-professional in a dimly lit, high-tech office. The primary light source is the cool blue and purple glow from multiple monitors, reflecting realistically on his skin and the rims of his glasses. He wears a matte black tech-hoodie. You can see the reflection of code on his pupils. The background is a clean, minimalist setup with blurred hardware components. Shot on Sony A7S III, 24mm f/1.4, f/1.8, low-light performance, sharp focus, minimal noise. Cinematic 16:9 aspect ratio, futuristic but realistic.

prompts.title: Heritage Palace Courtyard
prompts.prompt: Vertical architectural portrait of a man in a grand Mughal-style palace. He wears a deep maroon Sherwani with intricate, hand-stitched gold embroidery; the metallic threads catch the natural daylight. He stands in a sunlit archway, with the stone carvings behind him showing realistic weathering and texture. The lighting is bright and airy, highlighting his calm, dignified expression. Skin shows natural texture without any artificial smoothing. Shot on Hasselblad H6D, 80mm, f/4, crisp details, royal aesthetic. Vertical 9:16 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Tokyo Rain Night
prompts.prompt: Widescreen cinematic photograph of a man under a transparent umbrella in Shinjuku at night. Raindrops are frozen in mid-air by a fast shutter speed, reflecting the neon signs. His dark trench coat is visibly wet, with water beading on the shoulders. The background is a vibrant, multi-colored bokeh of Tokyo's street lights and signs. His face is lit by the ambient neon glow, showing realistic skin tones under mixed lighting. Shot on Canon EOS R3, 50mm f/1.2, ISO 800, 1/500s. Cinematic 16:9 aspect ratio, urban realism.

prompts.title: Manhattan Penthouse Dusk
prompts.prompt: Vertical high-fashion portrait of a man on a Manhattan penthouse terrace during the blue hour. He wears a bespoke black wool suit; the fabric texture is sharp and detailed. Behind him, the Empire State Building and city lights are blurred into a professional bokeh. The lighting is a mix of the fading natural sky and warm interior light from the terrace. His expression is neutral and high-fashion. Shot on Phase One XF, 80mm lens, f/2.8, ultra-high dynamic range. Vertical 9:16 aspect ratio, luxury magazine style.

prompts.title: Neo-Noir Alleyway
prompts.prompt: Widescreen neo-noir portrait of a man in a misty urban alleyway. A single flickering pink neon sign provides a strong rim light along his jawline and shoulder. He wears a futuristic matte-finish utility jacket with visible zippers and straps. Steam rises from a nearby vent, catching the light in a realistic volumetric way. The mood is mysterious and cinematic. Sharp focus on the eye closest to the light. Shot on Blackmagic Pocket Cinema Camera 6K, 35mm, f/1.4, cinematic grain. 16:9 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Historic Meeting with Dr. Mohammad Ashraf Ghani
prompts.prompt: Create an ultra-realistic 4K photograph of a formal meeting moment with a legendary Afghan president, Dr. Mohammad Ashraf Ghani (use an authentic portrait reference online such as this one: https://worldjusticeproject.org/sites/default/files/images/bio/2017/AshrafGhaniFINAL2.jpg — a real portrait of Dr. Ghani), in a high-level diplomatic setting. The president is wearing a formal suit, exuding authority, intelligence, and composure with a confident, natural expression. The second figure (use the reference image provided — keep my face 100% identical, including skin texture, facial hair, hairstyle, expression, and all facial features with no alterations) stands beside him, slightly angled as if engaged in a respectful conversation or photo opportunity. Maintain realistic body proportions, accurate lighting, reflections, and shadows, capturing a believable political and formal atmosphere. Background: an official government or diplomatic environment with subtle blur, flags or institutional elements softly visible, and elegant lighting. Ensure both subjects appear naturally together in a photorealistic, high-quality, professional photograph. Shot with a high-end portrait lens, f/1.8 aperture, HDR, 4K resolution, cinematic color grading, ultra-detailed skin textures, clothing fabric realism, and sharp focus.

prompts.title: Pacific Northwest Forest
prompts.prompt: Vertical nature portrait of a man in a mossy, evergreen forest. Soft, dappled sunlight filters through the canopy, creating 'God rays' and natural highlights on his olive utility jacket. He is looking off-camera, his face showing realistic sun-spots and fine lines. The background is a lush, deep green blur of ferns and ancient trees. The air looks slightly damp and fresh. Shot on Sony A7R V, 85mm f/1.4, f/2.2, organic colors, sharp focus on the subject. Vertical 9:16 aspect ratio, National Geographic style.

prompts.title: Venice Beach Skater
prompts.prompt: Widescreen action-portrait of a skater resting at a concrete bowl in Venice Beach. He wears a vintage-wash graphic t-shirt; you can see the faded print and cotton texture. He has a relaxed posture, with a skateboard leaning against his leg. The lighting is the harsh, bright midday sun of California, creating clean, sharp shadows. Background shows a blurred palm tree and a hint of the ocean. Shot on Leica SL2, 35mm f/2, ISO 50, 1/1000s, high clarity. Cinematic 16:9 aspect ratio, authentic street culture.

prompts.title: Stylish Man with White Hair and Beard
prompts.prompt: A high-detail 3D digital render in a 9:16 aspect ratio, maintaining the exact character and facial features from the uploaded reference image. The man features thick, swept-back white hair, a full white beard, and thick-rimmed white aviator glasses. He is wearing a white knitted scarf and a white outfit. The style is minimalist and monochromatic with soft, cinematic lighting and a neutral grey background. Focus on preserving the facial features and textures of the subject. --ar 9:16
